about.title1: Hi! I’m Kyrylo, a passionate Frontend Developer specializing in React and modern web technologies.
about.title2: I mainly work with React, JavaScript, Tailwind, and SASS to build responsive and interactive web interfaces.
about.title3: I enjoy creating pixel-perfect designs and smooth UI animations that enhance user experience.
about.title4: I’m looking to grow as a frontend developer, learning new technologies and building great user interfaces.
about.main-stack: Main stack : HTML, CSS, SASS, JAVASCRIPT, REACT
about.focus: Focus : UI/UX, Responsive Design, Animations & Transitions, Performance Optimization
about.card-back-text: My social media and contact information

soft-skills.communication-description-1: Explain technical concepts clearly to teammates
soft-skills.communication-description-2: Ask clarifying questions to avoid misunderstandings
soft-skills.communication-description-3: Present information in structured and concise way
soft-skills.problem-solving-description-3: Debug systematically using logs and devtools
soft-skills.work-approach-description-1: Write clean, maintainable, and readable code
soft-skills.work-approach-description-2: Focus on understanding problems before implementing solutions
soft-skills.work-approach-description-3: Refactor code to improve clarity and performance
soft-skills.learning-description-1: Quickly adapt to new technologies and frameworks
soft-skills.learning-description-2: Leverage official documentation as primary learning resource
soft-skills.teamwork-description-3: Share knowledge and help teammates improve
soft-skills.responsibility-description-1: Deliver tasks on time and reliably
soft-skills.responsibility-description-3: Take ownership and accountability for tasks

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.project1-description: Car rental website with pagination and filters; tech stack: Vite, TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS, Redux Toolkit, React Router, Axios, REST API
portfolio.project2-description: Responsive portfolio website developed collaboratively with a team; tech stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Swiper.js library
portfolio.project3-description: Responsive website using SCSS variables and mixins for layout; tech stack: HTML, SCSS, JavaScript
